name: prior_stroke_or_stroke_family
notes: Use ICD families I60-I64/G45 and legacy prefixes.

name: map_merged
normalization_rule: Prefer invasive MAP when available, otherwise non-invasive MAP.

name: temperature_c
normalization_rule: Convert Fahrenheit readings to Celsius; keep Celsius readings unchanged.

name: urine_output_items
normalization_rule: Aggregate validated urine-output itemids to hourly totals.

name: urineoutput
normalization_rule: Hourly aggregate from validated outputevents itemids.

name: gcs_total
notes: Prefer sum of corrected components unless an independent validated total is selected.
normalization_rule: Sum validated GCS eye, verbal, and motor components unless a validated independent total is selected.

name: rass
normalization_rule: Use validated Richmond Agitation-Sedation Scale itemid 228096.

name: delirium_assessment
normalization_rule: Map chartevents values to Positive/Negative/UTA flags.

name: cam_component_items
notes: CAM support only; 228300 is too sparse to serve as primary signal.

name: delirium_note_keywords
notes: Low frequency; do not use as primary label source.

name: glucose_merged
normalization_rule: Prefer serum glucose; fallback to bedside glucose when serum is missing.

name: pao2_fio2_ratio
normalization_rule: Use derived PF ratio when available from blood-gas table.

name: troponin_i
notes: No meaningful ICU coverage in v3.1.

name: procalcitonin
notes: No confirmed standard item in MIMIC-IV v3.1.

name: vasopressor_dose_norepi_equiv
normalization_rule: Convert agent-specific vasopressor doses to norepinephrine-equivalent burden.

name: fluid_input_hourly
normalization_rule: Aggregate infusion volumes within hour bins.

name: fluid_balance
normalization_rule: Hourly fluid input minus hourly urine output.

name: stroke_proxy_deterioration_markers
source: GCS / RASS / vent / restraint / sedation pattern

name: diagnosis_pathway_events
source: threshold crossings + procedure time + note mention + derived onset tables
normalization_rule: Convert diagnosis-related signals into time-stamped pathway events with source/confidence/proxy semantics.

name: raw_notes_0_168h
normalization_rule: Preserve timestamped note order; no pooling in the mainline representation.

name: clean_note_text
normalization_rule: Sentence-level clean policy removes heuristic AFTER sentences from note text.

name: note_sequence_object
source: ordered note list with timestamps and type
normalization_rule: Store notes as ordered per-stay sequences with timestamps and note type.
